mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sites
(name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR region ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sites (code, name, region, contact, phone, active, version_ids, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{region}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{active}, #{versionIds}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sites SET code = #{code}, region = #{region}, contact = #{contact}, phone = #{phone}, active = #{active}, version_ids = #{versionIds}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sites WHERE version_ids::jsonb @> to_jsonb(#{versionId})
